summary: Tested 401 Unauthorized bug fix for subscription update on mobile. All backend and frontend tests passed. Cookie fix (secure=True, samesite=none) and axios 401 interceptor working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns cookies that work for authenticated requests - PASS
Backend: POST /api/auth/refresh refreshes access_token correctly - PASS
Backend: POST /api/auth/refresh without token returns 401 - PASS
Backend: POST /api/subscription/update with valid auth returns 200 - PASS
Backend: POST /api/subscription/update to croissance plan - PASS
Backend: POST /api/subscription/update to flotte_pro plan - PASS
Backend: POST /api/subscription/update to solo plan - PASS
Backend: GET /api/subscription/current returns current plan - PASS
Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns all plans - PASS
Backend: POST /api/subscription/update without auth returns 401 - PASS
Backend: GET /api/subscription/current without auth returns 401 - PASS
Backend: Driver cannot update subscription (403) - PASS
Backend: Full subscription flow (login -> update -> verify persistence) - PASS
Frontend: Login as admin (admin@transporter-pro.com / admin123) - PASS
Frontend: Navigate to Subscription page - PASS
Frontend: Click 'Choisir ce plan' on Croissance - no 401 error - PASS
Frontend: Click 'Choisir ce plan' on Flotte Pro - plan changes successfully - PASS
Frontend: Toast messages appear on plan change ('Plan FLOTTE PRO activé !') - PASS
Frontend: Plan badge updates in sidebar after plan change - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Backend cookies correctly set with secure=True, samesite='none' for cross-site HTTPS requests
Frontend axios interceptor correctly handles 401 with token refresh queue pattern
SubscriptionContext.jsx correctly checks user auth before API call and redirects to /login if not authenticated
SubscriptionPage.jsx correctly guards handleSelectPlan with user auth check
context_for_next_testing_agent: 401 bug fix verified. Subscription update works correctly with secure cookies (secure=True, samesite=none). Axios 401 interceptor with token refresh queue pattern working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_subscription_auth.py covers all subscription and auth cookie scenarios. Firestore permission errors in console are non-blocking and expected in preview environment.

mocked_apis.firestore_sync: May fail with Permission Denied in preview environment (non-blocking)

console_warnings: Firestore getAll drivers error: Missing or insufficient permissions (non-blocking)
Firestore sync failed (non-blocking): Missing or insufficient permissions

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: 401 Unauthorized error when clicking 'Choisir ce plan' on mobile
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Cookies had secure=False + samesite=lax, which breaks on HTTPS mobile
fix_applied: Backend: Changed all cookies to secure=True, samesite='none'
Frontend: Added axios 401 interceptor with automatic token refresh
Frontend: Added login redirect if user not authenticated when selecting plan
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: FIXED - All tests pass, no 401 errors on subscription update
